title: Hub Receipt — Unified Envelope
description: Schema for the signed envelope defined by Hub Receipt v0.1. Consumer specifications (mcp-trust-registry session receipts, agent-2fa authorization receipts, and others) extend the envelope by populating subject.domain and claims; this schema constrains only the envelope itself.

receipt_id.description: Receipt identifier assigned by the issuer. Receipt-unique within an issuer.

issued_at.description: RFC 3339 date-time of issuance. UTC suffix recommended.

issuer_key_id.description: Identifier of the ed25519 public key that signed this envelope. Resolution to a key is consumer-spec-defined.

domain.description: Consumer-spec namespace. Each consumer spec registers one domain (e.g. 'mcp-trust', 'agent-2fa').

name.description: Human-readable subject identifier (e.g. an MCP server name). Mutually exclusive with 'identifier'.

identifier.description: Opaque subject identifier (e.g. an action_id). Mutually exclusive with 'name'.

subject.description: Identifies what the receipt is about. 'domain' is required; exactly one of 'name' or 'identifier' is required.

claims.description: Domain-specific claim set. Schema is owned by the consumer specification matched by subject.domain. Envelope verifiers MUST NOT interpret claims.

signature.description: ed25519 signature over the canonical bytes of this envelope with the 'signature' field removed.
